NEW DRIFT SUB-CLASS (latent-ambiguity-unmasked): a dropped inline schema can also remove a worked-example whose number was STALE (topics_reconciled:9 vs golden 10) AND whose surrounding cue was vague enough to let the runner re-derive the wrong value; fix = sharpen the cue's derivation source (count from INPUT rules[], not agreed[]), never re-add the schema/example.
